title: RandomItemGiverX
description: Gives you random items every 10 seconds.
body:
![A player being lucky with the datapack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/276901f5740e3b16594e87ad462b43fe9eda593d.png)
RandomItemGiverX gives you random items every 10 seconds out of an item list, consisting of 500 items total.

To toggle the DataPack, simply run ```/function rigx:toggle_true``` or ```/function rigx:toggle_false```
![Toggling the datapack via commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9f18afc191f252b86b080055f63c39a6b4c27cf_0.webp)

If you want to use this datapack for your video, feel free to! All I ask for is for you to link the datapack in your description.

For bug reporting, please read the ReadMe.txt file in the datapack .zip
